chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P No. D- 1085 of 2026 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ Fresh case. 1. For order on Misc. No. 4518/2026. (Urgent/App) 2. For order on Misc. No. 4519/2026. (Exemption/App) 3. For hearing of main case. 23.02.2026 Mr. Ramiz Naseem,, Advocate for Petitioners. Ms. Mehreen Ibrahim, DAG. DSP Ayaz Ahmed Pandhiani, Foreign Registration Officer Special Branch, Karachi, SIP Jawiad Akbar FRO/SB, Karachi. ---------- DSP Ayaz Ahmed Pandhiani, Foreign Registration Officer Special Branch, Karachi and SIP Jawiad Akbar FRO/SB, Karachi are in attendance today in relation to similar matters, being C.P Nos. D-959 of 2025 and 720 of 2026. They and the learned DAG waive notice of this Petition upon being provided a copy thereof. Learned counsel for the Petitioners invites attention to Order dated 10.02.2026 made in C.P No. D- 350 of 2026 and submits that the instant Petition may also be disposed of accordingly. The Learned DAG and functionaries in attendance do not oppose such submission. Under such circumstances, by consent, the Petition stands disposed of in the following terms: i. The Petitioners shall obtain travel permits from the High Commission of Bangladesh, Karachi. The same shall be verified from the Ministry of Foreign Affairs for confirmation of their genuineness. ii. Petitioners are allowed to travel subject to further verification of their status, criminal record, CRO/CRI. iii. The Director General NADRA Sindh is directed to verify the identity of the Petitioner’s through biometric for NADRA registration.

Petitioners are allowed to travel subject to further verification of their status, criminal record, CRO/CRI. iii. The Director General NADRA Sindh is directed to verify the identity of the Petitioner’s through biometric for NADRA registration. If the Petitioners are registered in NADRA their CNICs may be cancelled / blocked. iv. The Director General, NADRA Sindh is further directed to provide certificate to the Petitioners subject to the above. v. After completion of all codal formalities as required under the Foreign Act 1946, the Petitioners may be permitted to travel to their native country Bangladesh. Judge Judge Ayaz
